upgrade_source: MTA press release: MTA Unveils New Entrance and Accessibility Upgrades at Sheepshead Bay Subway Station; Brooklyn Reporter (February 2026)
notes: Two new elevators connecting street level to platforms, unveiled February 19, 2026. New entrance with three turnstiles, two exit gates, two new stairs. Widened sidewalks on both sides. ADA push-button door access. Elevators designed floodproof up to 7 feet for storm resilience. New lighting, Help Points, fire prevention, speaker system.
